item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- config/onboarding.json'
jq . longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json
printf '%s\\n' '--- docs/onboarding.md'
sed -n '1,160p' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md
printf '%s\\n' '--- abandoned-mode scan'
set +e
scan="'$(rg -n -i '"'batch|fallback' longhorizon-work/scenario-02 2>&1)
scan_exit="'$?
if [ -n "$scan" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$scan"; else printf '"'%s\\n' '(no matches)'; fi
printf 'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$scan_exit"'

item.aggregated_output:
--- config/onboarding.json
{
  "schema_version": 2,
  "mode": "streaming",
  "max_parallel": 3,
  "owner": "operations",
  "queues": [
    "new",
    "retry"
  ]
}
--- docs/onboarding.md
# Onboarding

Run onboarding in streaming mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `retry` with up to three jobs in parallel:

```sh
onboarding run \
  --config config/onboarding.json \
  --mode streaming \
  --max-parallel 3 \
  --owner operations \
  --queue new \
  --queue retry
```
--- abandoned-mode scan
(no matches)
exit_status=1
